Your Railway,
Simplified.

আপনার রেলযাত্রা, সহজ করা হলো।

RailMate gives Bangladeshi train travelers real-time schedules, fare info, community delay reports, and smart journey tools — all in one app.

Train Schedules

Browse full timetables for all Bangladesh Railway routes.

Community Reports

Real-time updates from thousands of fellow travelers.

Delay Alerts

Get notified immediately about delays on your routes.

Fare Lookup

Instantly find fares for all classes across any route.

Why Travelers Choose RailMate

Built by Bangladeshis, for Bangladeshis. We understand the unique challenges of our railway system.

Community-Powered Intelligence

Our data isn't just static schedules. It's alive with real-time reports from thousands of commuters across Bangladesh.

Bengali-First Design

Built specifically for our people. Every screen is optimized for both Bengali and English, ensuring accessibility for all.

Free & Always Reliable

We believe travel info should be free. RailMate is committed to providing essential features at no cost, forever.

Community Driven

Real Reports.
Real Travelers.

RailMate is powered by thousands of travelers sharing real-time updates. Know about delays, crowding, and coach conditions before you even reach the station.

Delay Reporting

Crowdsourced delay times updated by passengers on the train.

Crowd Status

Real-time occupancy info to help you choose the right coach.

🔴 DelayReported 3 min ago

Subarna Express

12 confirmed
🟡 CrowdingStanding room only

Dhaka to Chittagong

8 confirmed
🟢 On TimeRunning as scheduled

Sonar Bangla Express

25 confirmed

Built for the
Bangladeshi Traveler

Bengali & English

Native support for both languages across the entire app.

Works Offline

Access full train schedules even without an internet connection.

Free to Use

Core features like schedules and fares are free forever.

Community Verified

Reports are validated by other travelers in real-time.

Regular Updates

Timetables and features updated frequently.

Privacy First

We collect minimal data and never sell your personal info.
